public.summary: Zyxel super-admin password leak affecting multiple router models

assigned.summary: ZXHN H188A V6.0 unauthenticated credential disclosure via the web wizard, leading to admin, WLAN, and PPPoE credential exposure and auth bypass
assigned.status_note: Assigned by MITRE in March 2026. Public reference gist is available.

assigned.summary: ZXHN H-series multiple models unauthenticated denial of service via oversized `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` POST bodies against the management interface
assigned.status_note: Assigned by MITRE in March 2026. Public reference gist is available.

assigned.summary: ZXHN H298A and H108N sensitive data exposure through the web interface, leading to admin and WLAN credential disclosure
assigned.status_note: Assigned by MITRE in March 2026. Public reference gist is available.
